name: Route96
compose:
name: slashnode-route96
services:
  server:
    image: voidic/route96:v0.7.0
    container_name: route96-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      RUST_LOG: info
      APP_PUBLIC_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8002
    volumes:
      - server_data-uploads:/app/data
      - server_data-config.yaml:/app/config.yaml
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8002:8002
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.2.4
    container_name: route96-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_USER: route96
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_DATABASE: route96
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-route96_server_data-uploads
  server_data-config.yaml:
    name: slashnode-route96_server_data-config.yaml
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-route96_db_data-db
